title: HAUSPROFI Embroidery Starter Kit - Cross Stitch Kit Including 50 Colours, 30 Needles, 7 Bamboo Frames, Kumihimo Disk, Cross Stitch Fabric
features: Package contents: 50 x embroidery threads, 7 x embroidery hoops (4 inches, 6 inches, 7 inches, 8 inches, 9 inches, 11 inches, 12 inches), 30 x needles, 3 x needle threaders, 10 x thread wax, 1 x Kumihimo disk, 1 x cross stitch fabric
Precious gift: Enjoy the DIY embroidery process, complete the work with love and give it as a gift to your family or friend, it will be a meaningful experience

Speed up your embroidery work: The complete set of embroidery starter kits is designed to make your work more efficient. With all accessories and instructions, your embroidery will be much easier than ever
Easy to use: different sizes for different sized embroidered fabrics, non-distortion, non-fading, the embroidered cloth is tightened via the natural stretch of the bamboo hoop

Wide application: The embroidery set is a simple, unique and beautiful craft for clothing, curtains, cushion covers, place mats, decorative paintings, insoles, purses, towels, tablecloths and other frequently used household items
